ddls:
CREATE TABLE "riders" (
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rider */,
  "rider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the rider */,
  "rider_email" TEXT /* Email address of the rider */,
  "rider_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the rider */,
  "rider_address" TEXT /* Address of the rider */,
  "rider_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the rider */,
  "rider_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the rider */,
  "rider_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the rider */,
  "rider_status" TEXT /* Current status of the rider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "rider_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the rider (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "rider_achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements of the rider */,
  "rider_experience" TEXT /* Brief description of the rider's experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "show_date" TEXT /* Date of the show */,
  "show_location" TEXT /* Location of the show */,
  "show_organizer" TEXT /* Name of the show organizer */,
  "show_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the show */,
  "show_description" TEXT /* Description of the show */,
  "show_status" TEXT /* Status of the show (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  "show_sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor, if applicable */,
  "show_website" TEXT /* URL of the show's website */,
  "show_social_media" TEXT /* Links to the show's social media pages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_category" TEXT /* Category of the class (e.g., Adult Hunter 36 and Over O/F, Adult Hunter 36 and Over U/S) */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show where the class is held */,
  "class_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the class (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "class_judges" TEXT /* Names or IDs of the judges for the class */,
  "class_prizes" TEXT /* Information about the prizes awarded in the class */,
  "class_rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_class_category FOREIGN KEY ("class_category") REFERENCES class_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rider */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place achieved in the class */,
  "entries" INTEGER /* Number of entries in the class */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded in the class */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "result_version" INTEGER /* Version of the result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  "result_judge" TEXT /* ID or name of the judge who awarded the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_results_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_results_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rider_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rider */,
  "profile_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the rider's profile photo */,
  "rider_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the rider */,
  "rider_achievements" TEXT /* Achievements of the rider */,
  "rider_experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the rider */,
  "rider_awards" TEXT /* List of awards received by the rider */,
  "rider_ratings" TEXT /* Ratings or scores given by other riders or judges */,
  "rider_social_media" TEXT /* Links to the rider's social media pages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rider_profiles_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the category (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "category_judges" TEXT /* Names or IDs of the judges for the category */,
  "category_prizes" TEXT /* Information about the prizes awarded in the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the class within the show */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "schedule_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_schedules_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_schedules_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, create, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., rider, show, class) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class */,
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rider */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment or feedback */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "comment_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who posted the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_comments_rider_id FOREIGN KEY ("rider_id") REFERENCES riders ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_comments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)
